name: Country Pork Chops with Sage Smashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 lb (4 medium) potatoes - cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook potatoes, covered, in 2 inches of boiling water until tender, about 20 minutes.
2. While the potatoes are cooking, mix olive oil with garlic and rub onto both sides of the pork chops.
3. Coat a large nonstick skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
4. Add the pork chops to the skillet and cook over medium heat until they are lightly browned and the meat is no longer pink, about 10 minutes on each side. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Drain the potatoes, then shake them in the pan over low heat for 1 minute.
6. Remove from heat and smash the potatoes with a fork, leaving them lumpy.
7. Mix in butter, then milk and sage. Cook over low heat for 2 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Serve the pork chops with the mashed potatoes.
Menu: Sauteed Apple Wedges, Angel Food Cake
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 390 calories; 20 g fat; 90 mg cholesterol; 130 mg sodium; 27 g carbohydrate; 2 g fiber; 26 g protein.
Source: The Potato Board
